infos.name: 餐厅
infos.desc:
You are in a 餐厅. A typical kind of place.



You don't like doors? Why not try going north, that entranceway is unguarded. There is an exit to the west. Don't worry, it is unguarded.

infos.name: 厨房
infos.desc:
You're now in a 厨房.



There is an unblocked exit to the east. There is an unblocked exit to the north.

infos.name: 储物间
infos.desc:
I am so happy to announce that you are now in the 储物间.



You don't like doors? Why not try going south, that entranceway is unguarded.

infos.name: 冰箱区
infos.desc:
You are in a 冰箱区. An ordinary kind of place.



You need an unguarded exit? You should try going south.
